channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Man charged with murder in killings of 3 on Hawaii’s Big Island
item.description: Police in Hawaii have charged a 36-year-old man with killing three people in a remote community known for its communal lifestyle.

item.title: Newark mayor imposes curfew around Delaney Hall after clashes over immigration detention center
YouTuber box office boom: ‘Backrooms’ and ‘Obsession’ draw Gen Z to theaters
